name: canifi
description: Core LifeOS skill - enables AI assistant with research, storage, and iMessage integration. Transforms Claude into a personal life operating system with deep research capabilities via Gemini, structured storage via Notion, and mobile messaging via iMessage.
author: Canifi

environmentVariables.name: CANIFI_GOOGLE_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Google account email for Playwright authentication (Gemini, Gmail, etc.)

environmentVariables.name: CANIFI_GOOGLE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Google account password for Playwright authentication

environmentVariables.name: CANIFI_IMESSAGE_CONTACTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated whitelisted iMessage contacts (phone numbers with +1, emails)

environmentVariables.name: CANIFI_NOTION_WORKSPACE
environmentVariables.description: Notion workspace name for display purposes
